paragraphs: CS student and Demonstrator at ELTE University, supporting the Application of Discrete Models course at the Faculty of Informatics.

Driven by a strong passion for technology and problem-solving, I have experience with programming languages such as Python, Java, C, and C#, along with web technologies including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React.js, Node.js, MongoDB, Git, and REST APIs.
My growing interest in Data Science and Machine Learning motivates me to work with data, build analytical thinking, and explore intelligent solutions to real-world problems.
I am a curious and proactive learner with strong analytical, organizational, and teamwork skills, always eager to expand my knowledge and take on new challenges in technology and data-driven fields.
